response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal music performance matches the lyrics of 'Baka Mitai' from the Yakuza series. 2. subtitles.original: 一人になって 3年が過ぎ
subtitles.english: Three years have passed since I became alone,

subtitles.original: 街並みさえも 変わりました
subtitles.english: Even the cityscape has changed.

subtitles.original: なのに なのに どうして
subtitles.english: And yet... And yet, why...

subtitles.original: 未練だけ 置き去り
subtitles.english: ...am I left with nothing but regrets?

subtitles.original: ほんまに ロクな男やない
subtitles.english: You really are a good-for-nothing man.

subtitles.original: 揃いの指輪 はずします
subtitles.english: I'll take off our matching rings.

subtitles.original: ざまあみろ せいせい するわ
subtitles.english: Serves you right, what a relief!

subtitles.original: いい加減 待ってても
subtitles.english: Even if I wait forever...

subtitles.original: 馬鹿みたい
subtitles.english: ...I'm just a fool.

subtitles.original: だめだね だめよ だめなのよ
subtitles.english: No good, no good, no good at all.

subtitles.original: あんたが 好きで好きすぎて
subtitles.english: I love you, I love you too much.

subtitles.original: どれだけ 強いお酒でも
subtitles.english: No matter how strong the alcohol,

subtitles.original: 歪まない思い出が
subtitles.english: the memories don't distort...

subtitles.original: 馬鹿みたい
subtitles.english: ...I'm just a fool.

subtitles.original: ほんまに ロクな男やない
subtitles.english: You really are a good-for-nothing man.

subtitles.original: 揃いの指輪 はずします
subtitles.english: I'll take off our matching rings.

subtitles.original: ざまあみろ せいせい するわ
subtitles.english: Serves you right, what a relief!

subtitles.original: なんなのよ この涙
subtitles.english: What are these tears?

subtitles.original: 馬鹿みたい
subtitles.english: I'm just a fool.

subtitles.original: Whoa, yeah, yeah. Musicals is where it's at.
subtitles.english: Whoa, yeah, yeah. Musicals is where it's at.

subtitles.original: I think, I think this could really be...
subtitles.english: I think, I think this could really be...

subtitles.original: This is gonna get us the big dollars.
subtitles.english: This is gonna get us the big dollars.

subtitles.original: Yeah, hopefully the big mouse is not gonna shoot us in the head.
subtitles.english: Yeah, hopefully the big mouse is not gonna shoot us in the head.

subtitles.original: Ten billion dollars!
subtitles.english: Ten billion dollars!

subtitles.original: What big mouse?
subtitles.english: What big mouse?

subtitles.original: Ten... don't worry about it.
subtitles.english: Ten... don't worry about it.

subtitles.original: Ten billion dollars! Yeah! / It's really good.
subtitles.english: Ten billion dollars! Yeah! / It's really good.

subtitles.original: We might need like a different type of show too, you know? Just for variety. So they can't shoot us...
subtitles.english: We might need like a different type of show too, you know? Just for variety. So they can't shoot us...

subtitles.original: A variety show? / Yeah.
subtitles.english: A variety show? / Yeah.

subtitles.original: Like a variety game show? / Yeah.
subtitles.english: Like a variety game show? / Yeah.

subtitles.original: The Autofister Games.
subtitles.english: The Autofister Games.

subtitles.original: The Autofister... physicals?
subtitles.english: The Autofister... physicals?

subtitles.original: Games. Physicals.
subtitles.english: Games. Physicals.

subtitles.original: But first, a word from our sponsors.
subtitles.english: But first, a word from our sponsors.

subtitles.original: Whoa! / Whoa!
subtitles.english: Whoa! / Whoa!

subtitles.original: Slow down there, partner!
subtitles.english: Slow down there, partner!

subtitles.original: Hold your horses! Don't you think you're scrolling a little too fast?
subtitles.english: Hold your horses! Don't you think you're scrolling a little too fast?

subtitles.original: Yeah, put down the phone and full screen our video instead, because...
subtitles.english: Yeah, put down the phone and full screen our video instead, because...

subtitles.original: We are about to show you the new hottest thing in town!
subtitles.english: We are about to show you the new hottest thing in town!

subtitles.original: Introducing the...
subtitles.english: Introducing the...

subtitles.original: Autofister Network!
subtitles.english: Autofister Network!

subtitles.original: Get it? Cuz it's Autofister Network, but this is our merch.
subtitles.english: Get it? Cuz it's Autofister Network, but this is our merch.

subtitles.original: We wanted to take this opportunity to show you all of our cool fun merch before it goes live!
subtitles.english: We wanted to take this opportunity to show you all of our cool fun merch before it goes live!

subtitles.original: We've got Cemimis,
subtitles.english: We've got Cemimis,

subtitles.original: Gimimis,
subtitles.english: Gimimis,

subtitles.original: Grems,
subtitles.english: Grems,

subtitles.original: Otomos,
subtitles.english: Otomos,

subtitles.original: And this neat acrylic stand of the both of us!
subtitles.english: And this neat acrylic stand of the both of us!

subtitles.original: Yay! And if you hurry up, you'll even be able to get the limited set with a postcard signed by both of us!
subtitles.english: Yay! And if you hurry up, you'll even be able to get the limited set with a postcard signed by both of us!

subtitles.original: Woohoo!
subtitles.english: Woohoo!

subtitles.original: It will be live at these exact times! So make sure to check it out then!
subtitles.english: It will be live at these exact times! So make sure to check it out then!

subtitles.original: Coming soon to a stream near you!
subtitles.english: Coming soon to a stream near you!

subtitles.original: And we're back from our commercial break!
subtitles.english: And we're back from our commercial break!

subtitles.original: Thank you everyone for waiting!
subtitles.english: Thank you everyone for waiting!

subtitles.original: Welcome back to the official... Autofister...
subtitles.english: Welcome back to the official... Autofister...
